test_scenario: Gate E already passed; request to continue into Phase 8 in same session

findings.non_negotiable_rule_4: Explicitly forbids Phase 8 continuation in same session after Gate E
findings.workflow_rule_answer_provided: Yes, with exact handoff command pattern

phase_8_execution_model: strict TDD red->green->refactor with dependency ordering
parallelism_rules: concurrent execution only for parallelizable tasks with satisfied dependencies and no file overlap
gate_structure: task graph itself is the gate structure
context_window_rationale: Documented - session boundary manages context window between planning (1-7) and implementation (8-11)
